name: Qwen-VL (Alibaba)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0 for most sizes); commercial license for 72B; HuggingFace model download

auth.notes: Local: no auth. Alibaba Cloud API: API key for hosted inference.

performance.notes: 7B model: ~1s on A100; 72B: much slower; smaller variants (3B, 7B) practical on consumer GPU

agent_readiness.notes: Alibaba's top-performing open-source VLM family. Qwen2.5-VL ranks among best open-source VLMs. Strong document understanding (OCR, charts, tables), video understanding, agent visual reasoning. Multiple sizes: 3B (consumer GPU), 7B, 72B. HuggingFace Transformers integration. Used via vLLM for production serving. Outperforms LLaVA and competitive with GPT-4V on many benchmarks.

gotchas: Chinese origin — model behavior may differ for Chinese vs English content
Commercial license restrictions for largest model
HuggingFace Transformers inference can be slow — use vLLM for production
best_when: State-of-the-art open-source VLM for document/image understanding
Document OCR with structural understanding (tables, charts)
When Claude/GPT-4V API costs are prohibitive for VLM tasks
avoid_when: Strict commercial license compliance needed for 72B
summary: Qwen-VL is Alibaba's top-performing open-source VLM family (Qwen2.5-VL). Ranks among best open-source VLMs for document OCR, chart/table understanding, and visual reasoning. Multiple sizes (3B, 7B, 72B). HuggingFace Transformers integration. Competitive with GPT-4V on benchmarks. Best self-hosted VLM for document intelligence tasks.
